name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Lg
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends an LG infrared remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The LG code to send, see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Nbits
config_entries.description: The number of bits to send. Defaults to `28`.
